title: Create a new organization from the dashboard sidebar and land on the new org settings page
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a new organization from the sidebar and is taken to the organization settings context afterward.

steps.description: Click "Create new organization" from the sidebar
Type "QA Org Alpha" into the organization name field

title: View organization members list on settings
description: Verifies the organization settings page displays the members list for the current organization.

steps.description: Verify element "Organization members list" is visible

title: Invite a member by email and see a new pending invitation
description: Verifies an admin can invite a member from organization settings and a pending invitation appears in the invitations list.

steps.description: Type "invitee.qa+pending1@example.com" into the invitation email field

title: Invite member with an invalid email format shows validation error
description: Verifies the invite form validates email format and shows a visible error without creating an invitation.

steps.description: Type "not-an-email" into the invitation email field
Verify text "Enter a valid email" is visible

title: Create a generator with runtime limits and warning threshold
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a generator from the dashboard sidebar modal and land on the generator detail page.

steps.description: Click the plus button in the sidebar to open the create generator modal
Fill "Generator A" into the generator title field
Fill "Model X" into the model field
Fill "Basement backup generator" into the description field
Fill "8" into the max consecutive run hours field
Fill "2" into the required rest hours field
Fill "80" into the runtime warning threshold percentage field

title: Create generator validation: required fields left blank
description: Verifies required-field validation messages appear when attempting to create a generator with missing required inputs.

steps.description: Click the plus button in the sidebar to open the create generator modal
Verify text "Title is required" is visible
Verify text "Model is required" is visible

title: Create generator validation: runtime hours must be valid numbers
description: Verifies numeric validation triggers when runtime limit fields contain invalid values.

steps.description: Click the plus button in the sidebar to open the create generator modal
Fill "Bad Hours Gen" into the generator title field
Fill "Model Y" into the model field
Fill "-1" into the max consecutive run hours field
Fill "-2" into the required rest hours field
Verify text "Max consecutive run hours must be" is visible
Verify text "Required rest hours must be" is visible

title: Create generator validation: warning threshold percent out of range
description: Verifies warning threshold percentage enforces valid range and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click the plus button in the sidebar to open the create generator modal
Fill "Threshold Gen" into the generator title field
Fill "Model Z" into the model field
Fill "150" into the runtime warning threshold percentage field
Verify text "Warning threshold must be" is visible

title: Cancel create generator modal without creating a generator
description: Verifies closing the create generator modal does not create a generator and returns the user to the dashboard view.

steps.description: Click the plus button in the sidebar to open the create generator modal
Verify text "Create generator" is not visible

title: Start and stop a live runtime session and verify it appears in history
description: Verifies a user can start a live session, see live runtime UI updates, stop the session, and see a new history row with a duration.

steps.description: Click on the first organization shown on the dashboard (if prompted) to enter an organization dashboard
Click on the first generator shown in the organization dashboard list
Verify element "Runtime" (runtime session card/section) is visible
Click play button to start a new session
Verify element "Elapsed time" (live counter) is visible
Verify element "Runtime progress" (progress bar) is visible
Click stop button to end the current session
Verify element "Session history table" is visible

title: Live session shows an increasing elapsed time counter while running
description: Verifies the elapsed time counter updates during an active session.

steps.description: Click on the first organization shown on the dashboard (if prompted) to enter an organization dashboard
Click on the first generator shown in the organization dashboard list
Click play button to start a new session
Verify element "Elapsed time" (live counter) is visible
Verify element "Elapsed time" (live counter) is visible
Click stop button to end the current session

title: Runtime progress bar is visible during an active session
description: Verifies the runtime progress indicator against max consecutive hours is shown when a session is running.

steps.description: Click on the first organization shown on the dashboard (if prompted) to enter an organization dashboard
Click on the first generator shown in the organization dashboard list
Click play button to start a new session
Verify element "Runtime progress" (progress bar) is visible
Click stop button to end the current session

title: Log a manual past session and verify it appears in session history with duration
description: Verifies a user can log a manual session by entering past start/stop times and see it listed in history.

steps.description: Click on the first organization shown on the dashboard (if prompted) to enter an organization dashboard
Click on the first generator shown in the organization dashboard list
Verify element "Log manual session" modal/dialog is visible
Type "2026-03-10 10:00" into the start time field
Type "2026-03-10 12:00" into the stop time field
Verify element "Session history table" is visible

title: Manual session validation: stop time earlier than start time shows an error and does not save
description: Verifies the manual session modal rejects invalid time ranges and keeps the user in the modal with an error message visible.

steps.description: Click on the first organization shown on the dashboard (if prompted) to enter an organization dashboard
Click on the first generator shown in the organization dashboard list
Verify element "Log manual session" modal/dialog is visible
Type "2026-03-10 12:00" into the start time field
Type "2026-03-10 10:00" into the stop time field
Verify text "Stop time must be after start time" is visible

title: Prevent starting a session when generator status is resting (error shown)
description: Verifies attempting to start a session while the generator is in a resting state shows a visible error and does not start a session.

steps.description: Click on the first organization shown on the dashboard (if prompted) to enter an organization dashboard
Click on a generator that shows status "Resting" in the list (scroll if needed)
Click play button to start a new session
Verify text "Cannot start session while resting" is visible
Verify element "Elapsed time" (live counter) is not visible

title: Open organization dashboard and verify generator status indicators and active session card are visible
description: Verifies the dashboard shows a generator list with visible status dots and an active session card with elapsed time.

steps.description: Verify element "Sidebar generator list" is visible
Verify element "Generator status indicator dot" is visible
Verify element "Active session" card is visible

title: From attention required alert, navigate to generator detail page
description: Verifies that clicking an attention-required alert routes the user to the generator detail page.

steps.description: Verify element "Attention required" section is visible
Click the first visible alert item in the "Attention required" section

title: Verify active session card shows elapsed time when a session is running
description: Verifies the active session card surfaces an elapsed time value for a running generator session.

steps.description: Verify element "Active session" card is visible
Verify element "Elapsed time value" is visible

title: Warning indicator: click warning/attention item and verify generator detail displays warning state
description: Verifies that a near-run-limit warning can be clicked and the generator detail view shows a warning highlighted.

steps.description: Verify element "Attention required" section is visible
Click a visible alert item that indicates a warning or near limit condition
Verify element "Warning" highlighted indicator is visible

title: Resting state: verify rest countdown is visible when a generator is resting
description: Verifies that when a generator is in resting state, the UI shows a rest countdown/timer indicator.

steps.description: Verify element "Generator status indicator dot" is visible

title: Available state: verify at least one generator appears available with a normal status indicator
description: Verifies the dashboard can display an available generator state with a visible normal/available indicator.

steps.description: Verify element "Sidebar generator list" is visible
Verify element "Generator status indicator dot" is visible

title: Sync/status computation error: surface error message that generator status cannot be determined
description: Verifies an error banner/message is shown when generator status cannot be computed due to sync issues.

steps.description: Verify element "Generator status" area is visible
Verify text "cannot be determined" is visible

title: Create a recurring run-hours maintenance template and verify it appears with due status indicators
description: Verifies a user can create a run-hours recurring maintenance template and see it displayed as a template card with due status indicators.

steps.description: Click on the first generator shown on the organization dashboard to open its generator detail page
Click Maintenance tab on generator detail page
Enter task name "Oil Change" into the task name field
Enter description "Change oil and inspect for leaks" into the description field
Set trigger interval value to "50" hours

title: Create a calendar-days one-time maintenance template and verify it appears
description: Verifies a user can create a calendar-based one-time maintenance template and see it displayed on the Maintenance tab.

steps.description: Click on the first generator shown on the organization dashboard to open its generator detail page
Click Maintenance tab on generator detail page
Enter task name "Air Filter Replace" into the task name field
Enter description "Replace air filter element" into the description field
Set trigger interval value to "30" days
Verify text "Air Filter Replace" is visible

title: Create a whichever-first (both) maintenance template and verify it appears
description: Verifies a user can create a template triggered by whichever comes first (run hours or calendar days) and it is shown on the Maintenance tab.

steps.description: Click on the first generator shown on the organization dashboard to open its generator detail page
Click Maintenance tab on generator detail page
Enter task name "Spark Plug Inspection" into the task name field
Enter description "Inspect and clean spark plug" into the description field
Set trigger interval value to "100" run hours
Set trigger interval value to "90" calendar days
Verify text "Spark Plug Inspection" is visible

title: Record maintenance completion with notes and verify record appears in history
description: Verifies a user can record a maintenance completion with notes and see the record in maintenance history.

steps.description: Click on the first generator shown on the organization dashboard to open its generator detail page
Click Maintenance tab on generator detail page
Click record button on the first visible maintenance template card
Enter notes "Completed during weekly check; replaced consumables" into the notes field
Click save to record maintenance completion
Verify text "Completed during weekly check; replaced consumables" is visible

title: Generate AI maintenance suggestions and accept one to save a maintenance template
description: Verifies an admin can generate AI maintenance plan suggestions during generator creation and accept a suggestion that is saved and visible on the generator detail page.

steps.description: Click the plus button in the sidebar to open the create generator modal
Fill "Test Generator Model A" into the generator model field

title: AI suggestions appear after generating and can be reviewed
description: Verifies AI suggestions are displayed after requesting them and the user can view the suggested plan content for review.

steps.description: Click the plus button in the sidebar to open the create generator modal
Fill "Test Generator Model B" into the generator model field

title: Accepting an AI suggestion creates a maintenance template visible after save
description: Verifies accepting an AI suggestion results in a suggested maintenance template being created and shown after saving the generator and opening its detail page.

steps.description: Click the plus button in the sidebar to open the create generator modal
Fill "Test Generator Model C" into the generator model field

title: AI generation shows an in-progress state while waiting for results
description: Verifies the UI indicates progress while the AI agent is generating maintenance suggestions.

steps.description: Click the plus button in the sidebar to open the create generator modal
Fill "Test Generator Model D" into the generator model field

title: Generate suggestions button remains unavailable until required generator fields are provided
description: Verifies the UI prevents generating AI suggestions when mandatory generator information (such as model) is missing.

steps.description: Click the plus button in the sidebar to open the create generator modal
Verify text "Model is required" is visible

title: User can edit suggested values before saving generator
description: Verifies suggested maintenance template fields can be edited after AI generation and before confirming save.

steps.description: Click the plus button in the sidebar to open the create generator modal
Fill "Test Generator Model E" into the generator model field

title: AI suggestion generation failure shows a visible error state
description: Verifies that if AI suggestions cannot be generated, the UI displays a visible error message and allows the user to continue without suggestions.

steps.description: Click the plus button in the sidebar to open the create generator modal
Fill "Test Generator Model F" into the generator model field

title: Admin assigns an organization member to a generator and sees them in the assigned list
description: Verifies an admin can assign a member to a generator and the member appears in the assigned employees list.

steps.description: Click on the first generator shown on the dashboard
Select a member from the "Assign member" dropdown

title: Admin completes assignment confirmation and verifies assigned member appears
description: Verifies the assignment confirmation completes and the assigned member becomes visible in the assigned employees list.

steps.description: Click on the first generator shown on the dashboard
Select a member from the "Assign member" dropdown

title: Admin sees assigned member in list after assignment is confirmed
description: Verifies the UI updates to show the newly assigned member in the assigned employees list after confirmation.

steps.description: Click on the first generator shown on the dashboard
Select a member from the "Assign member" dropdown
Verify element "Assigned employees list" is visible

title: Admin unassigns an employee with confirmation and employee is removed from list
description: Verifies an admin can unassign an assigned employee using the confirmation dialog and the employee disappears from the list.

steps.description: Click on the first generator shown on the dashboard
Click the "Unassign" button for the first assigned employee
Click the "Confirm" button in the unassignment dialog

title: Admin cancels unassignment and assigned employee remains in list
description: Verifies canceling the unassignment confirmation dialog does not remove the employee from the assigned list.

steps.description: Click on the first generator shown on the dashboard
Click the "Unassign" button for the first assigned employee
Click the "Cancel" button in the unassignment dialog

title: Admin verifies assigned employee is still visible after canceling unassignment
description: Verifies the assigned employees list still shows the employee after the unassignment dialog is canceled.

steps.description: Click on the first generator shown on the dashboard
Click the "Unassign" button for the first assigned employee
Verify element "Unassignment confirmation dialog" is visible

title: Non-admin cannot assign members and sees admin-only permission error
description: Verifies a non-admin user cannot assign a member and receives a visible permission error message.

steps.description: Click on the first generator shown on the dashboard

title: Non-admin cannot see unassign controls on assigned employees list
description: Verifies unassign controls are not visible for non-admin users on the generator assigned employees list.

steps.description: Click on the first generator shown on the dashboard

title: Stop an active runtime session from the dashboard active session card
description: Verifies an active session can be stopped from the dashboard and the UI updates to remove the active session card.

steps.description: Click the "Stop" button on the active session card
Verify element "Active session" is not visible

title: Active session card displays elapsed time and stop control
description: Verifies the active session card (when present) shows elapsed time and a stop button on the dashboard.

title: Upcoming maintenance list is shown and ranked by urgency
description: Verifies the dashboard shows an upcoming maintenance section with items prioritized by urgency.

title: Open a maintenance item and navigate to the generator detail page
description: Verifies clicking an upcoming maintenance item routes the user to the generator detail page.

steps.description: Click the first item in the "Upcoming maintenance" list

title: Assigned generators list shows generator entries with status indicators
description: Verifies the dashboard shows a list of assigned generators and each entry includes a visible status indicator.

title: Navigate to generator detail by clicking a generator in the dashboard list
description: Verifies clicking a generator entry from the dashboard navigates to the generator detail page.

steps.description: Click the first generator in the "My generators" list

title: Attention Required section is visible when alerts exist
description: Verifies the dashboard shows an Attention Required section for alerts and the section is visible to the user.

title: Scroll to locate a generator when many are listed (no search/filter)
description: Verifies users can locate items by scrolling in the generators list when no search/filter is available.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the "My generators" list

title: Switch organization from sidebar dropdown updates dashboard context
description: Verifies that switching the organization in the sidebar updates the current dashboard context and reflects the selected organization.

title: Generator list updates after switching organization
description: Verifies that the sidebar generator quick-access list changes when a different organization is selected.

steps.description: Verify element "Sidebar generator list" is visible
Verify element "Generator status indicator dots" is visible

title: Navigate to a generator detail page from the sidebar generator list
description: Verifies that clicking a generator in the sidebar opens its detail page.

steps.description: Click a generator in the sidebar generator list

title: Open organization Settings from sidebar navigation
description: Verifies that the Settings link in the sidebar navigates to the organization settings page.

steps.description: Click the "Settings" navigation link in the sidebar

title: Sign out from user profile redirects to sign-in
description: Verifies that the user can sign out from the sidebar user profile menu and is redirected to the sign-in route.

steps.description: Click the user profile control in the sidebar

title: Toggle theme from sidebar persists visually within the session
description: Verifies that toggling the theme from the sidebar results in an immediate visible UI change indicating the theme switched.
